'''''Star Wars: The Best of PC''''' is a compilation of five computer games, released by [[LucasArts]] in [[November]] [[2006]]. A fourteen-day trial of [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] is also included.

==Contents==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*[[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] {{C|14-day trial}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''
